role: A self-contained React extension widget that renders a fixed-position live digital clock overlay.
capabilities: Displays current time in HH:MM:SS format
Updates displayed time every second via setInterval
Positions itself as a fixed top-right overlay with themed styling
substance_why: The file fully implements a working live clock with formatting, state updates, interval lifecycle, and rendered styled output.
interactions_missing: No configuration via props (position, format, refresh rate, timezone)
No user controls to show/hide or customize the widget
No accessibility markup such as aria-label or live region
performance_risks: setInterval re-renders the component every second unconditionally
Hardcoded zIndex of 9999 can create stacking-context conflicts
Inline style object is recreated on every render
reuse_verdict_why: The timekeeping logic is sound and reusable, but the hardcoded layout, inline styles, and lack of configurability must be rebuilt for the design system.
decomposition_hints: Separate time formatting and interval hook from presentational markup
Extract styling into theme-aware component props or CSS module
Remove hardcoded fixed positioning into a configurable container/placement API
